data.body: Implemented: tracker path/symlink/exclude in init.py routed through config.tracker_dir(); exclude entry is now the repo-relative tracker path (handles custom + nested + absolute-relocation dirs). Smoke-tested: a custom tracker.dir='my-ticket-store' creates+excludes+round-trips create/list. 26 init tests pass; subagent review clean (fixed a stale docstring). Default .tickets-tracker behavior byte-for-byte unchanged.
